CE1.justification: Acted directly; internal reads of AGENTS.md/registers were agent-side orientation and imposed no load on the user.

CE2.justification: One compact sentence covering all three destinations, no preamble or padding.

CE3.justification: Names the three destination files but the why (descriptive pattern, not a decision) is hidden in private notes rather than surfaced in-band.

CE4.justification: Each write is self-contained; partial completion at any point would leave a coherent register state.
